confuse.example: The hard question confused the students.
confuse.example_zh: 這道難題把學生搞糊塗了。

connect.example: This road connects the two towns.
I connect this song with summer.
connect.example_zh: 我把這首歌和夏天聯想在一起。

conscious.example: She was conscious after the fall.
He is conscious of his weak points.

considerable.example: He spent a considerable amount of time on it.
considerable.example_zh: 他在這上面花了相當多的時間。

constant.example: There was constant noise from the street.

continent.example_zh: 非洲是一塊很大的大陸。

controller.example: He pressed a button on the game controller.
controller.example_zh: 他按下遊戲控制器上的一個按鈕。

cooker.example: She cooked the rice in a rice cooker.

costly.example: Building a new house is costly.
costly.example_zh: 蓋一棟新房子花費很高。

cotton.example: This shirt is made of soft cotton.
cotton.example_zh: 這件襯衫是用柔軟的棉做的。

cough.example: Cover your mouth when you cough.

countable.example: An apple is a countable noun.

county.example: They live in a quiet county in the south.
county.example_zh: 他們住在南部一個安靜的郡。

crab.example: We caught a crab on the beach.
crab.example_zh: 我們在海灘上抓到一隻螃蟹。

cradle.example: The baby slept in a wooden cradle.
cradle.example_zh: 寶寶睡在一個木製搖籃裡。

crane.example: A crane lifted the heavy steel.
crane.example_zh: 起重機吊起沉重的鋼材。

crane.example: A white crane stood in the water.

crash.example: The two cars crashed at the corner.

crash.example_zh: 所有人都從這場空難中生還。

creative.example_zh: 她有許多有創意的點子。

creator.example: He is the creator of this game.
creator.example_zh: 他是這款遊戲的創作者。

creature.example: Strange creatures live deep in the sea.
creature.example_zh: 奇特的生物住在深海裡。

credit.example: She paid with a credit card.
She got the credit for the idea.
credit.example_zh: 這個點子的功勞歸於她。

crew.example: The ship's crew worked all night.

cricket.example: A cricket chirped in the grass.
cricket.example_zh: 一隻蟋蟀在草叢裡鳴叫。

crispy.example: The fried chicken was hot and crispy.

crop.example: Rice is an important crop in Asia.
crop.example_zh: 稻米是亞洲重要的農作物。

crown.example: The king wore a golden crown.
He was crowned king at twenty.

cruel.example: It is cruel to hurt animals.

cupboard.example: The cups are in the cupboard.

dairy.example: Milk and cheese are dairy products.
They run a small dairy farm.
dairy.example_zh: 他們經營一座小型酪農場。

dam.example: The dam holds back the river water.

dare.example: He didn't dare to jump from the wall.

dash.example: He made a dash for the bus.

dash.example_zh: 她贏得了一百公尺短跑。

database.example: All the names are stored in a database.
database.example_zh: 所有名字都存在資料庫裡。

dawn.example: It dawned on me that I was wrong.

dealer.example: He bought the car from a local dealer.
dealer.example_zh: 他向當地經銷商買了車。

decade.example: She has taught here for a decade.

deck.example: We watched the sea from the ship's deck.
deck.example_zh: 我們在船的甲板上看海。

deck.example: He shuffled the deck of cards.

decorate.example: We decorated the room for the party.
decorate.example_zh: 我們為派對布置了房間。

decrease.example: The number of birds has decreased.
There was a decrease in sales.

deed.example: Helping others is a good deed.
He signed the deed to the house.

definition.example: Look up the definition in the dictionary.
definition.example_zh: 在字典裡查這個字的定義。

democracy.example: In a democracy, people choose their leaders.
democracy.example_zh: 在民主制度下，人民選出領袖。

democratic.example: They live in a democratic country.
democratic.example_zh: 他們住在一個民主國家。

deposit.example: We paid a deposit for the room.
She deposited the money at the bank.

designer.example: She is a famous fashion designer.
designer.example_zh: 她是知名的時裝設計師。

desirable.example: A quiet home is desirable for studying.

desire.example: He has a strong desire to learn.

dessert.example: We had ice cream for dessert.
